prestazioni: VR6 3.6L (BWS) engine: APR Stage 3+ turbo kit with Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, custom 4-inch downpipe, and APR high-flow fuel pump (350+ HP, 380+ Nm torque on 98 RON fuel)
KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with adjustable damping and 30mm front / 25mm rear lowering, paired with H&R 24mm front / 22mm rear anti-roll bars for B6/B7 chassis reinforcement
APR Carbonio intake system with heat-shielded 3.5-inch velocity stack, paired with 630cc Bosch EV14 injectors and APR fuel rail for VR6-specific fueling upgrades
estetica: Rieger Tuning RS6-style front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter and OEM+ fog light deletes, matched with a custom 3M Matte Anthracite vinyl wrap (color code LY7W)
OEM+ Passat R36 rear diffuser with integrated dual 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust tips (custom fabrication by Milltek Sport for BWS engine compatibility)
BBS LM 19x9.5 ET35 (front) / 19x10.5 ET40 (rear) wheels with 245/35/19 and 275/30/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with H&R Trak+ wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)
